user.title: Connect to FUSE Energy
user.description: Enter your FUSE Energy account email address.

otp.title: Enter verification code
otp.description: Enter the OTP code sent to your email by FUSE Energy.

magic_link.title: Magic Link Authentication
magic_link.description: Click the link sent to your email, then click Submit below to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to FUSE Energy. Check your network.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the logs for details.
error.no_premises: No premises found for this account.
error.magic_link_pending: Magic link not verified yet. Click the link in your email and try again.

abort.already_configured: This FUSE Energy account is already configured.
